Interface ServerMessageVisitor

public interface ServerMessageVisitor
Visitor for server-to-client messages. Dispatch goes through ServerMessage.accept(ServerMessageVisitor). All methods default to no-op so implementers only override the messages they care about.

    • visit

      default void visit(PingMessage message)
      Transport-only liveness probe. Filtered by the read loop, never reaches the view.
      Parameters:
      message - the ping message
